description: Shadow Warden AI — Managed Extension Storage Policy
instructions: Deploy this file via Google Workspace Admin > Devices > Chrome > Apps & Extensions
Or via Windows GPO: Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > Google > Chrome > Extensions
Set as 'Managed storage schema' for the extension ID obtained after publishing to Chrome Web Store

gatewayUrl.title: Shadow Warden Gateway URL
gatewayUrl.description: URL of the Shadow Warden AI server (Hetzner or on-premise)

apiKey.title: Tenant API Key
apiKey.description: X-API-Key issued by your MSP via POST /onboard

ollamaUrl.title: Local AI URL
ollamaUrl.description: URL of local AI (Ollama/LM Studio) for YELLOW zone redirect

enabled.title: Protection Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the extension actively intercepts AI requests

notifyOnBlock.title: Desktop Notifications
notifyOnBlock.description: Show desktop notifications when a request is blocked

minRiskNotify.title: Minimum risk level for notifications
minRiskNotify.description: Only notify for this risk level and above
